scripts.postinstall:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('prisma')) fs.mkdirSync('prisma'); if(!fs.existsSync('prisma/schema.prisma')) fs.writeFileSync('prisma/schema.prisma', 'datasource db { provider = "postgresql" 
 url = env("DATABASE_URL") }
generator client { provider = "prisma-client-js" }
model User { id String @id }
model Project { id String @id 
 name String 
 originalImageId String 
 rating Int @default(0) 
 isFavorite Boolean @default(false) 
 adjustments String 
 historyIndex Int @default(0) }
model Preset { id String @id 
 name String 
 code String @unique 
 category String 
 adjustments String 
 isCustom Boolean @default(false) 
 isFavorite Boolean @default(false) }'); process.env.DATABASE_URL=process.env.DATABASE_URL||'postgresql://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy'; require('child_process').execSync('prisma generate', {stdio: 'inherit'});"
